subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest the Kingdom of Heaven! Thy letter hath been received and its contents noted. The Holy Manifestations of God possess two stations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب ملکوت الله نامه شما رسید و مضمون معلوم گردید مظاهر مقدسه الهیه دو مقام
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @words vs deeds, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God
